question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/service/RecordFileService.java -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: findByBlockType()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a numeric block value equal to Long.MAX_VALUE (e.g., '9223372036854775807') so that the identity check `block == BlockType.LATEST` in RecordFileServiceImpl fails (different object reference), causing findByIndex(Long.MAX_VALUE) to execute a DB query for a non-existent index on every request, bypassing the LATEST cache and exhausting the database connection pool under concurrent load, resulting in non-network-based DoS?
